query:
SELECT u.id as "user_id!", u.name as "user_name!",
                      t.project_id, t.scope_workspace_id, t.scopes
               FROM api_tokens t
               JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id
               WHERE t.token_hash = $1
                 AND u.is_active = true
                 AND (t.expires_at IS NULL OR t.expires_at > now())
